name: Patient Case
history: Recurrent stomachaches and physical symptoms associated with anxiety and stress. Past difficulties involving weight management, sexuality, and academic performance. Reports a transformation during college. Reports seeking control in relationships.
intermediate_belief: I need to be in control to feel safe.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I can't manage my symptoms, I am failing.
coping_strategies: Seeks reassurance and control in relationships to manage anxiety.
situation: Experiencing ongoing stomach issues and seeking reassurance about recovery.
auto_thought: I need to control my symptoms or things will get worse.
behavior: Seeks reassurance and attempts to control situations to alleviate anxiety.
